biological_replicate: we generated mice with compound deletion of Mediator kinases CDK8 and CDK19
experimental_design: we generated a suite of genetically engineered mouse models harboring knockout and kinase-dead knockin alleles of CDK8 and CDK19
factor_value: the cyclin dependent kinases CDK8 and CDK19
number_of_biological_replicates: Cdk19–/– mice, Cdk8fl/fl mice, and VillinCreERT2 mice
